Small version of vi

Source: R/vi.R
vi_smol.Rd

Same as dataset vi, but with only 580 rows.

Usage

data(vi_smol)

Format

A data frame with 580 rows and 65 columns.

See also

vi

Other vi: vi, vi_extra(), vi_predictors, vi_responses

Examples

data(vi_smol)
colnames(vi_smol)
#>  [1] "longitude"                  "latitude"                  
#>  [3] "vi_numeric"                 "vi_counts"                 
#>  [5] "vi_binomial"                "vi_categorical"            
#>  [7] "vi_factor"                  "koppen_zone"               
#>  [9] "koppen_group"               "koppen_description"        
#> [11] "soil_type"                  "topo_slope"                
#> [13] "topo_diversity"             "topo_elevation"            
#> [15] "swi_mean"                   "swi_max"                   
#> [17] "swi_min"                    "swi_range"                 
#> [19] "soil_temperature_mean"      "soil_temperature_max"      
#> [21] "soil_temperature_min"       "soil_temperature_range"    
#> [23] "soil_sand"                  "soil_clay"                 
#> [25] "soil_silt"                  "soil_ph"                   
#> [27] "soil_soc"                   "soil_nitrogen"             
#> [29] "solar_rad_mean"             "solar_rad_max"             
#> [31] "solar_rad_min"              "solar_rad_range"           
#> [33] "growing_season_length"      "growing_season_temperature"
#> [35] "growing_season_rainfall"    "growing_degree_days"       
#> [37] "temperature_mean"           "temperature_max"           
#> [39] "temperature_min"            "temperature_range"         
#> [41] "temperature_seasonality"    "rainfall_mean"             
#> [43] "rainfall_min"               "rainfall_max"              
#> [45] "rainfall_range"             "evapotranspiration_mean"   
#> [47] "evapotranspiration_max"     "evapotranspiration_min"    
#> [49] "evapotranspiration_range"   "cloud_cover_mean"          
#> [51] "cloud_cover_max"            "cloud_cover_min"           
#> [53] "cloud_cover_range"          "aridity_index"             
#> [55] "humidity_mean"              "humidity_max"              
#> [57] "humidity_min"               "humidity_range"            
#> [59] "biogeo_ecoregion"           "biogeo_biome"              
#> [61] "biogeo_realm"               "country_name"              
#> [63] "continent"                  "region"                    
#> [65] "subregion"                 
nrow(vi_smol)
#> [1] 580
ncol(vi_smol)
#> [1] 65
